title: Returning Stock to Saleable Inventory
alt: Checklist of GDP conditions a return must meet before going back to saleable stock

items.label: Original sealed packaging
items.desc: Unopened secondary pack, tamper-evidence and safety features intact

items.label: Evidence of storage conditions
items.desc: Proof it stayed within approved conditions while out of control

items.label: Acceptable shelf life
items.desc: Sufficient expiry remaining and product not recalled

items.label: Authorised assessment
items.desc: Positive disposition by a trained, authorised person

items.label: Audit trail of supply
items.desc: Confirm you originally supplied it to that customer

items.label: Quarantine by default
items.desc: Segregate on receipt; release only after documented review
